<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] New or updated adapter
- [ ] Docs / tutorial

## Effect on the demo
<!-- Does this change the Northwind demo output (waves, classification, sampling, gate)?

## Checklist
- [ ] `make test` is green
- [ ] `make demo` runs end to end
- [ ] Updated tests / goldens if behavior changed
- [ ] No real customer names, credentials, hostnames, or absolute local paths
- [ ] Core stays source-agnostic (source-specific logic lives in an adapter)
